title: mercurialis × pubescens
intro: Mercurialis × pubescens, also known as the hybrid dog's mercury or pubescent dog's mercury, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Mercurialis × pubescens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, salves, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
